docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $439.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LEVIN, SANDRA K.
